text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho showdown is upon us.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. I may be capable of running with my
emotions completely unchecked now, but this will
be my first time doing so in an actual race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That said, I will be fine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have faith in everyone we've fought up until this
point.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And in your support as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: In other words, I fear nothing!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: All that's left is to see what comes of my decision!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: There she is! It's Yaeno Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Is it just me or does she look even more gallant
than usual? She's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, Yaeno! Looking good today!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... I feel as if I might get burnt if I'm not
careful.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno is as hot as a fresh-baked sweet potato
today! Yooow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You have no idea how long I've been awaiting this
day. Today, once again, I will shine with your
same burning intensity.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! I'm getting fired up just watching! I can't
wait until I can get back in there too!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... There's something different about you
today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There is. I've changed in order to defeat you. In
order to solidify who stands as the top three of
this generation.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ohh... Well, I'm not going down without a fight!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I would hope not. Let's head to the track and
settle this!
